title: ClassifierOutput
description: Canonical JSON Schema rendered from ClassifierOutputZodSchema in packages/contracts/src/classifier-schema.ts. Bound to Ollama's `format` parameter at module-load time via zod-to-json-schema. This file is committed for auditor review; the source of truth is the Zod schema, and any divergence between this file and the rendered output is a bug.

facet_domain.description: Primary subject area. MUST be present in the established-vocabulary snapshot loaded at classify-stage start (FR-CLASSIFY-006). If the classifier wants to propose a new domain, it MUST emit the closest-fitting established value here AND populate facet_domain_proposed with the new candidate. Validation rejects mismatch unless facet_domain_proposed is set (FR-CLASSIFY-007).

facet_type.description: Structural kind of document per SCHEMA.md v1.0 7-value enum. Constitutional taxonomy axis (FR-CLASSIFY-014) — NOT dynamic vocabulary. Hardcoded enum imported from FACET_TYPE_VALUES constant.

tags.description: 3-10 grep-able keywords. Each entry MUST be present in the established-vocabulary snapshot's tag set OR present in this same response's facet_tags_proposed array. Mixed established-and-proposed tag arrays are permitted; tags neither established nor proposed route the row to failure lane (FR-CLASSIFY-006 defense-in-depth).

summary.description: One-sentence (15-25 words target) insight capturing the document's core. Lands in the body-file YAML frontmatter (FR-CLASSIFY-008). NEVER appears in telemetry payloads (Principle I + SC-CLASSIFY-020). Max 500 chars for size-budget compatibility.

domain.description: Self-reported confidence on the facet_domain assignment.

type.description: Self-reported confidence on the facet_type assignment.

tags.description: Self-reported confidence on the tags assignment (aggregate across all returned tags).

confidence.description: Confidence sub-scores in [0, 1]. NEVER persisted to disk per Principle II / FR-CLASSIFY-013. Retained in-memory for retry-decision logic and in the classify.completed telemetry event's confidence_summary field (rounded to 2 decimal places).

facet_domain_proposed.description: OPTIONAL. Present iff the classifier proposes a new domain not in the established-vocabulary snapshot. If present, SP-004 INSERTs (axis='domain', term=<value>, state='proposed', established_at=NULL) into taxonomy_terms via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (FR-CLASSIFY-007 + Decision I). The value is NEVER written to the documents.facet_domain SQL column (the proposed-term field is metadata about the proposal, not the document's official classification).

facet_tags_proposed.description: OPTIONAL. Each entry is a proposed new tag. SP-004 INSERTs (axis='tag', term=<entry>, state='proposed', established_at=NULL) via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Established tags go in `tags`; only never-seen candidates go in this proposed array.
